title: Jordan Stone
description: Visiting Scholar — [Jordan](https://www.linkedin.com/in/stonescience/)’s work concerns the relationship between rapid AI progress with space governance and the long-term future. Previously he was a PhD student researching astrobiology at Imperial College Lond
body:
# Jordan Stone

**Role:** Visiting Scholar

[Jordan](https://www.linkedin.com/in/stonescience/)’s work concerns the relationship between rapid AI progress with space governance and the long-term future. Previously he was a PhD student researching astrobiology at Imperial College London. He is currently involved in a range of research and policy initiatives related to space governance and the long-term future.
